name: Chicken and Rice with Chipotle
recipeIngredient: 1 cup rice (I normally use Uncle B's long grain)
2 dry chipotle peppers (at the least - you
bouquet of herbs such as oregano or
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the ingredients: Cut the onion and bell peppers into fingertip-sized pieces. Tear the chipotle peppers into thumbnail-sized pieces (if serving non-chile heads, tear them into larger pieces). Cut the chicken into large nuggets. Mince the garlic. Crush the cumin.
2. Cook the rice with water according to package directions. Avoid more convenient varieties that look like chromosomes; long-grain is preferred, but wild rice or a mix of your choice works as well. Add turmeric and chipotle pepper, stirring occasionally.
3. Quickly fry the chicken, bell peppers, garlic, and onion until the chicken is cooked through and browned.
4. Combine all ingredients in the rice pot for the final moments of cooking. Add herbs and stir. If needed, keep the finished mix warm on the stove as people arrive at the table.
5. Serve and enjoy your meal.
